data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding resource dependencies.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the 'Resource dependencies' requirement, which necessitates confirmation that all necessary components (venue, catering, AV, and staff) are included in a single booking. However, the evidence provided only confirms the booking of a venue and catering, with no explicit confirmation of AV and staff availability. This lack of evidence leads to an inconclusive result regarding the satisfaction of the requirement.
gaps: AV and staff are not confirmed as part of the booking.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
